name: Mate
original_name: Mate เพื่อนรัก
overview: Kenlong has always had it all—beauty, wealth, and brains. Perfection is her standard, especially when it comes to love. But her world is turned upside down when she reunites with her childhood friend, Oengoei, an innocent and carefree girl. As their paths intertwine, Kenlong finds herself drawn to Oengoei, leading to a forbidden attraction that challenges her meticulously crafted life.

trailers.title: [Eng Sub] Mate The Series | Trailer Pilot
